items.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says

items.title: Dog Saved from Pound Rescuers New Owner from House Fire: ‘A genuine treasure’
items.summary: From a New Zealand outlet comes the story of a man who saved a dog from the pound, and the dog who saved him from perishing in a house fire. Even though her new forever home has turned to ashes, Hazel…
